{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Sage of Brooms
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sage of Brooms]] is an ancestor in a long line of janitors.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
